steps.title: Write the daily-gain inequality
steps.content:
The elephant starts at $200$ pounds and gains more than $2$ but less than $3$ pounds per day. After $d$ days, the possible weight is:
$$200+2d\lt w\lt200+3d$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The possible weights are represented by $930\lt w\lt1295$, which is choice D. Choice C is only the weight gained; it forgets to add the starting $200$ pounds.
